per_question.question: What are the main features of the OmniDoc system?
per_question.answer: Based on the documents: OmniDoc is a multi-sector document intelligence system. Regarding 'What are the main features of the OmniDoc system?': The system uses hybrid retrieval combining dense vector search with sparse BM25, followed by GPU reranking for accurate results.
contexts: OmniDoc implements a multi-LLM fallback chain: Ollama -> Groq -> Gemini -> Cloudflare -> HuggingFace.
The system uses pgvector for storing document embeddings with hybrid retrieval combining dense and sparse search.
Six sector configurations are supported: Agriculture, Healthcare, Legal, Finance, Education, and IT.
RBAC roles include viewer (read-only), editor (upload and query), and admin (full management).
Scanned PDFs are handled using pytesseract OCR with auto-detection.
per_question.ground_truth: OmniDoc provides multi-sector document intelligence with RAG-based querying, RBAC team management, OCR for scanned PDFs, and a multi-LLM fallback chain.

per_question.question: How does the multi-LLM fallback chain work?
per_question.answer: Based on the documents: OmniDoc is a multi-sector document intelligence system. Regarding 'How does the multi-LLM fallback chain work?': The system uses hybrid retrieval combining dense vector search with sparse BM25, followed by GPU reranking for accurate results.
contexts: OmniDoc implements a multi-LLM fallback chain: Ollama -> Groq -> Gemini -> Cloudflare -> HuggingFace.
The system uses pgvector for storing document embeddings with hybrid retrieval combining dense and sparse search.
Six sector configurations are supported: Agriculture, Healthcare, Legal, Finance, Education, and IT.
RBAC roles include viewer (read-only), editor (upload and query), and admin (full management).
Scanned PDFs are handled using pytesseract OCR with auto-detection.
per_question.ground_truth: The system tries Ollama first, then falls back to Groq, Gemini, Cloudflare Workers AI, and finally HuggingFace if previous providers fail.

per_question.question: What sectors does OmniDoc support?
per_question.ground_truth: OmniDoc supports 6 sectors: Agriculture, Healthcare, Legal, Finance, Education, and IT.

per_question.question: What user roles are available in OmniDoc?
per_question.ground_truth: OmniDoc supports three roles: viewer (read-only), editor (can upload and query), and admin (full workspace management).

per_question.question: How are scanned PDFs handled?
per_question.ground_truth: Scanned PDFs are processed using pytesseract OCR which auto-detects whether a PDF needs OCR and extracts text accordingly.
